compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect onboarding UX improvements
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the onboarding changes: dependency prerequisites, integration setup, phase counter behavior
**Why**: Future agents and users need accurate documentation about the updated onboarding flow
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (onboarding section references), .claude/design-notes.md (if onboarding patterns changed), KNOWN-ISSUES.md (if any known limitations discovered)
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, updating README/INSTALL.md (handled by docs epic 91f5-0aec)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately reflects the updated onboarding behavior (dependency pre-scan, integration setup, phase counter)
  ← Satisfies: all SCs (documentation reflects implemented changes)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
VERIFICATION_RESULT: pass
criteria: 5/5 passed
All onboarding UX behaviors documented in CLAUDE.md: /dso:onboarding Quick Reference entry (line 19), Architecture paragraph covering Step 0 dep pre-scan, Phase N of Y counter, Figma/Confluence config-gated integration setup, and autonomous-vs-interactive preplanning question (line 206).
comments.author: Test
